title: Help with updating Status Column values with API v1
excerpt: I am updating Monday.com from our software that we reproduce.  I can’t use V2 yet, so I have a partial implementation with API v1.  The only one that doesn’t work is status columns.  Any help or pointers is greatly appre…

posts.author: DerekW (Derek Waterman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am updating Monday.com from our software that we reproduce. I can’t use V2 yet, so I have a partial implementation with API v1. The only one that doesn’t work is status columns. Any help or pointers is greatly appreciated. Here is my redacted PUT url: https://api.monday.com:443/v1/boards/[boardid]/columns/[columnid]/color.json?api_key=[apikey]&pulse_id=[pulseid]&color_index=0

I get a response of 500 when I use it.

posts.author: DerekW (Derek Waterman)
posts.cookedHtml: NVM (LOL). After a day of banging my head, just looking at my request after placing it here the answer was obvious. Wrong syntax for Status updates.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Heads up: we are deprecating our REST API in October 2020. The GraphQL API will be the only monday API from Oct 15th onwards.
